# POSTMAN_GET_A_SPECS_GENERATED_COLLECTIONS

**Description**: Tool to retrieve all collections generated from an API specification in Postman. Use when you need to fetch collections that have been auto-generated from a spec. Returns metadata and an array of generated collections.

## Input Parameters

| Parameter | Type | Required | Description |
|-----------|------|----------|-------------|
| type | unknown | No |  |
| title | unknown | No |  |
| required | unknown | No |  |
| properties | unknown | No |  |
| description | unknown | No |  |
